a:T19a6,<div class="question">
<p>Two cells are connected in parallel as shown below. Each cell has an emf of 5.0 V and an internal resistance of 2.0 Ω. The lamp has a resistance of 4.0 Ω. The ammeter is ideal.</p>
<p>What is the reading on the ammeter?</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>A.  1.0 A</p>
<p>B.  1.3 A</p>
<p>C.  2.0 A</p>
<p>D.  2.5 A</p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.HL.TZ1.21"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-2-heating-effect-of-electric-currents"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>A</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>The correct option (A) was selected with the lowest frequency of the four possible answers. This question has a low difficulty index, suggesting that the majority of candidates found it challenging. Students were asked to apply the concept of resistors in parallel; omitting the internal resistance in parallel to the external lamp resistance was the most common error here. This question is useful for the revision of resistors in combination.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
